title: Sudden Strike Gold
description:
NOTICEThis is a re-release of a classic game. Even though it was tested on a variety of modern Windows PC configurations, unwanted side effects such as video/audio glitches and crashes may occur. If you are encountering technical issues with this game, please visit the community forums for assistance and support.

Об игреSet in World War 2, Sudden Strike offers revolutionary real-time-strategy gameplay. Command Russian, German, French, American and British armies in large scale battles including urban warfare, beach landings and aerial invasions. Whichever tactics you choose, you will find it in Sudden Strike!Features
• Up to 1000 units per scenario including historically accurate tanks, artillery, infantry and aircraft

• Gigantic maps offer unparalleled strategic depth and tactical choices

• Destructable terrain, bridges, houses, fortifications and trees

• Build fortifications and pontoon bridges

• Contains the original RTS classic "Sudden Strike", "Sudden Strike Forever" add-on and "Total War" map pack

• Contains map editor
description_short: Set in World War 2, Sudden Strike offers revolutionary real-time-strategy gameplay. Command Russian, German, French, American and British armies in large scale battles including urban warfare, beach landings and aerial invasions. Whichever tactics you choose, you will find it in Sudden Strike!
